working: Alumni eNews - July 2026 (sent 7/9) remains the best recent send: 56.61% open, +77.2% traffic lift (14.5 to 25.7 daily sessions), and still the only send registering tagged email sessions (email_sessions_3d = 4).
Open rates keep running roughly double the 25-35% health benchmark: 52.1% account average across 100 campaigns; the two newest sends opened at 56.61% (Alumni 7/9) and 50.78% (Staff-Client 7/14).
The reminder/resend pattern keeps outperforming originals: Alumni Final Reminder (6/3) +65.2% and Staff-Client eNews May (5/19) +66.5% are the two biggest spring lifts.
GSC coverage ticked up vs the 7/13 run: 67 pages with impressions (from 66) and 20 tracked keywords returning data (from 16).
not_working: UTM leakage is still near-total: the Email channel holds only 9 sessions of 31,968 in the window (0.03%) while individual sends show 21-53 direct_sessions_3d with 0 email_sessions_3d - newsletter clicks keep landing in Direct.
Click rates on the newest sends are under 1% despite excellent opens: Alumni July 0.78% and Staff-Client June (7/14) 0.79%, both below the 2.03% account average with click-to-open under 1.6%.
Referring Partners eNews - June (7/2) underperformed on every metric: 25.76% open (half the account average), -25.3% lift, 0 tagged email sessions.
GSC impressions fell another 22% vs 7/13 (1,878 to 1,459) and impression-weighted position slipped 21.2 to 22.8; clicks flat at 8.
Yesterday's Staff-Client eNews - June 2026 (7/14, 8,894 sends - the largest list) shows only +2.6% lift on day one.
do_next: Add utm_source=constantcontact&utm_medium=email to every link in the Staff-Client and Referring Partners templates - the 7/9 Alumni send proved the tags register when present (4 email sessions), yet the 7/14 Staff-Client send again logged 0.
Schedule a reminder resend for the 7/14 Staff-Client eNews: it sits at +2.6% lift after day one, and reminder sends have delivered +65% lifts twice this spring.
Rework CTAs to close the open-vs-click gap (50-56% opens vs 0.78-0.79% clicks): one prominent CTA block, alumni/event-style content, which drove the May Alumni send to 1.79% click.

SEO follow-up on the continued GSC slide (impressions -22%, position 21.2 to 22.8 since 7/13): publish the staged draft queue (Jun-29/Jul-6 retunes, near-me packages) and re-check tracked keywords next run.
summary: Email opens stay excellent (52% avg; 7/9 Alumni send +77.2% lift) but UTM leakage still hides nearly all newsletter traffic inside Direct (9 Email sessions vs 16,248 Direct in the window) and the newest sends click under 1%. GSC impressions fell another 22% since 7/13, so the staged SEO drafts are the top follow-up.
